name: John Price
description:
[𝙱𝚞𝚝 𝚋𝚊𝚋𝚢, 𝙸 𝚠𝚘𝚗'𝚝 𝚕𝚎𝚝 𝚢𝚘𝚞 𝚍𝚘𝚠𝚗.](https://open.spotify.com/track/7xcU6jomyxCkWHazhRp4W6?si=7906c3b177e44a64)  
***
It was wrong, oh so wrong. Sneakin' away to have a few moments of quiet with you. He just doesn't want anyone to know or get you into trouble. But when he catches you flirting with Soap, even in good fun, well, Price does have an issue with that. He's a jealous man. 
***
`Secret Relationship. Jealous Price is hot.` *fans face* `Oh, uh, NSFW intro. Slight NSFW intro. Uhhh, some type of smexy smex.` 
***
`I used` [`Iorveths'`](https://janitorai.com/profiles/ae3b8516-54d5-4469-8557-6dcf808128d0_profile-of-iorveths) `bot definition for him!` 
***
`It was the closest image I could get from Midjourney that was similar to my other Midjourney Price picture.`
creator: anawright93
